name: Hayas Marketing
description: Creadores de SENSE, una plataforma de inteligencia de marketing que se implementa de forma personalizada para cada empresa. 4 módulos de inteligencia (Brain, Radar, Search, Strategy), framework LOOP y 6 Activaciones de ejecución. Cada empresa trabaja con su equipo, su agencia o con Hayas.
slogan: No necesitas más marketing. Necesitas mejores decisiones.

availableChannel.name: HAYAS Copilot - AI Assistant
availableChannel.description: Asistente IA inteligente disponible 24/7 para atención al cliente, cualificación de leads y orientación sobre servicios

knowsAbout.name: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
knowsAbout.description: Optimization of content for AI-powered answer engines

knowsAbout.name: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
knowsAbout.description: Optimization for visibility in generative AI systems like ChatGPT, Copilot, Perplexity

knowsAbout.name: Marketing Intelligence Platform
knowsAbout.description: Customizable marketing intelligence platform implemented for each company to work with their own team, agency, or execution partner

itemOffered.name: SENSE — Marketing Intelligence Platform
itemOffered.description: Marketing intelligence platform implemented on a personalized basis with 4 intelligence modules (Brain, Radar, Search, Strategy) and the LOOP framework. Each company works with their own team, agency, or with Hayas as execution partner.

itemOffered.name: Research Activation
itemOffered.description: Market intelligence, strategic consulting, applied AI and HAYAS Copilot AI assistant

itemOffered.name: Growth Activation
itemOffered.description: Inbound marketing, lead generation, direct marketing and funnel implementation

itemOffered.name: Visibility Activation
itemOffered.description: SEO positioning, Google Ads, social media advertising and community management

itemOffered.name: Web & Funnel Activation
itemOffered.description: Professional web design, Shopify e-commerce, conversion funnels and web hosting

itemOffered.name: CRM & Automation Activation
itemOffered.description: HubSpot and Go High Level CRM implementation, sales automation, email marketing workflows

itemOffered.name: Content & Brand Activation
itemOffered.description: Brand creation, content strategy and multilingual content localization

methodology.name: SENSE — Marketing Intelligence Platform
methodology.description: Marketing intelligence platform implemented on a personalized basis with 4 core modules and the LOOP framework (Listen, Observe, Orient, Plan). Each company works with their own team, agency, or with Hayas.

step.name: Listen
step.text: Monitor market signals and competitive intelligence through RADAR module

step.name: Observe
step.text: Detect patterns, opportunities and threats using SEARCH visibility and AI perception audits

step.name: Orient
step.text: Define market drivers and strategic directives via STRATEGY coherence scoring

step.name: Plan
step.text: Generate aligned activations with full traceability from signal to deliverable

hasPart.name: BRAIN — Strategic Identity
hasPart.description: Centralized marketing memory: value proposition, ICPs, Buyer Personas, competitive advantages and brand voice

hasPart.name: RADAR — Market Intelligence
hasPart.description: Continuous industry and competitor monitoring with AI-powered signal prioritization and Market Reports

hasPart.name: SEARCH — Visibility & Intent
hasPart.description: Keyword tracking on Google, Bing and AI engines (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity) with brand perception audits

hasPart.name: STRATEGY — Strategic Direction
hasPart.description: Market drivers, strategic directives and coherence scoring between execution and identity

brand.name: Hayas Marketing
brand.slogan: No necesitas más marketing. Necesitas mejores decisiones.
